title: DimensionBlocker
description: Want to restrict dimension access to several players/groups, but MultiverseCore is too heavy and complicated for you? Then, this plugin is what you seek.
body:
DimensionBlocker is a lightweight Minecraft plugin designed to restrict player access to several dimensions. It allows server admins to control which players can use portals to these worlds, making it ideal for survival servers, progression-based gameplay, or roleplay setups.

When a player without permission tries to enter a blocked dimension, their portal travel is cancelled, and they receive a clear denial message.

⚡ Features

Block access to the Nether by default.

Block access to the End (or other custom worlds if needed).

Easy permission-based control.

Lightweight and fast – no extra configuration required.

🔑 Permissions

netherblocker.access.nether	-	Allows a player to enter the Nether.

netherblocker.access.end	-	Allows a player to enter the End.

netherblocker.access.custom	-	Allows a player to enter custom worlds (future-proof). Plugin catches all registered custom world on load, and creates new children dimension.access.<worldname> permissions for each of them.

Players without these permissions will be prevented from traveling to the corresponding dimension and will see a denial message.

🛠️ Example Use Cases

Restrict Nether access until certain progression milestones are met.

Run an event server where only admins can open the End.

Create roleplay servers where only specific ranks can travel between worlds.
